heading: Technology transfer to small businesses
label: 7261b Technology transfer to small businesses
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1993, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.

children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall establish a program to facilitate and encourage the transfer of technology to small businesses and shall issue guidelines relating to the program not later than .May 1, 1993
For the purposes of this section, the term “small business” means a business concern that meets the applicable size standards prescribed pursuant to .section 632(a) of title 15
